title: Skeletal Muscle Extraction from AllProtect Tissue Reagent
author: Elisabeth Heuston

steps.title: Thaw tissue stored in AllProtect® Tissue Reagent on ice Sample
steps.instruction: Thaw tissue stored in AllProtect® Tissue Reagent on ice Sample

steps.title: Serially dilute and exchange AllProtect® Tissue...
steps.instruction: Serially dilute and exchange AllProtect® Tissue Reagent with PBS until all storage reagent has been removed

steps.title: Pulverize tissue to single cell suspension with single-use microtube homogenizer
steps.instruction: Pulverize tissue to single cell suspension with single-use microtube homogenizer

steps.title: Filter through 70 µm strainer into fresh 1
steps.instruction: Filter through 70 µm strainer into fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend in 0
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend in 0.5 mL pBSA

steps.title: Filter through 40 µm strainer into fresh 1
steps.instruction: Filter through 40 µm strainer into fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: This preparation will subsequently be referred to as filtered cells
steps.instruction: This preparation will subsequently be referred to as filtered cells

steps.title: Remove ~60,000 cells to fresh 1
steps.instruction: Remove ~60,000 cells to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’...
steps.instruction: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’ Library & Gel Bead Kit v2 sample capture

steps.title: Remove 250,000 cells to fresh 1
steps.instruction: Remove 250,000 cells to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 µL Nuclei Extraction Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 µL Nuclei Extraction Buffer

steps.title: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’...
steps.instruction: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’ Library & Gel Bead Kit v2 sample capture

steps.title: Remove 50,000 cells as an unstained...
steps.instruction: Remove 50,000 cells as an unstained cell control (bring minimum volume to 100 µL)

steps.title: Stain 500,000 cells with a final...
steps.instruction: Stain 500,000 cells with a final concentration of 25 µg/mL NPC-AF594

steps.title: Sort NPC-AF594+ cells on a Becton...
steps.instruction: Sort NPC-AF594+ cells on a Becton Dickinson FACS Aria Fusion using 70 µm nozzle into a collection tube on ice

steps.title: This preparation will subsequently be referred to as sorted cells
steps.instruction: This preparation will subsequently be referred to as sorted cells

steps.title: Remove ~100,000 cells to fresh 1
steps.instruction: Remove ~100,000 cells to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’...
steps.instruction: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’ Library & Gel Bead Kit v2 sample capture

steps.title: Remove 250,000 cells to fresh 1
steps.instruction: Remove 250,000 cells to fresh 1.5 mL tube

steps.title: Resuspend in 100 µL Nuclei Extraction Buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend in 100 µL Nuclei Extraction Buffer

steps.title: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’...
steps.instruction: Proceed to Chromium Single Cell 5’ Library & Gel Bead Kit v2 sample capture

steps.title: Start with up to 50,000 sorted...
steps.instruction: Start with up to 50,000 sorted cells (sorted cell capture preparation) or 50,000 sorted nuclei (sorted nuclei capture preparation) in 100 µL pBSA

steps.title: Stain with a final concentration of...
steps.instruction: Stain with a final concentration of 100 µg/mL NPC-AF594 + 50 µg/mL DAPI

steps.title: Transfer suspension to a 35 mm 1
steps.instruction: Transfer suspension to a 35 mm 1.5 coverslip dish

steps.title: Imaging was performed on an LSM...
steps.instruction: Imaging was performed on an LSM 880 Airyscan Confocal microscope (Zeiss) with a 63x/1.4 oil objective and captured with Zen_2.3 software (Zeiss).
